Package org.springframework.cloud.openfeign

package org.springframework.cloud.openfeign
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.annotation
     
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.aot
     
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.clientconfig
     
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.encoding
     
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.hateoas
     
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.loadbalancer
     
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.security
     
    org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.support
     
  • Class
    Description
    AnnotatedParameterProcessor
    Feign contract method parameter processor.
    AnnotatedParameterProcessor.AnnotatedParameterContext
    Specifies the parameter context.
    CachingCapability
    Allows Spring's @Cache* annotations to be declared on the feign client's methods.
    CircuitBreakerNameResolver
    Used to resolve a circuitbreaker name which will be used in CircuitBreakerFactory.
    CollectionFormat
    Indicates which collection format should be used while processing the annotated method.
    DefaultFeignLoggerFactory
     
    EnableFeignClients
    Scans for interfaces that declare they are feign clients (via FeignClient @FeignClient).
    FallbackFactory<T>
    Used to control the fallback given its cause.
    FallbackFactory.Default<T>
     
    FeignAutoConfiguration
     
    FeignAutoConfiguration.CircuitBreakerPresentFeignTargeterConfiguration
     
    FeignAutoConfiguration.DefaultFeignTargeterConfiguration
     
    FeignAutoConfiguration.FeignJacksonConfiguration
     
    FeignAutoConfiguration.Http2ClientFeignConfiguration
     
    FeignAutoConfiguration.HttpClient5FeignConfiguration
     
    FeignAutoConfiguration.Oauth2FeignConfiguration
     
    FeignBuilderCustomizer
    Allows application to customize the Feign builder.
    FeignCachingInvocationHandlerFactory
    Allows Spring's @Cache* annotations to be declared on the feign client's methods.
    FeignCircuitBreaker
    Allows Feign interfaces to work with CircuitBreaker.
    FeignCircuitBreaker.Builder
    Builder for Feign CircuitBreaker integration.
    FeignClient
    Annotation for interfaces declaring that a REST client with that interface should be created (e.g. for autowiring into another component).
    FeignClientBuilder
    A builder for creating Feign clients without using the FeignClient annotation.
    FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T>
    Builder of feign targets.
    FeignClientFactory
    A factory that creates instances of feign classes.
    FeignClientFactoryBean
     
    FeignClientProperties
     
    FeignClientProperties.FeignClientConfiguration
    Feign client configuration.
    FeignClientProperties.MicrometerProperties
    Micrometer configuration for Feign Client.
    FeignClientsConfiguration
     
    FeignClientsConfiguration.CircuitBreakerPresentFeignBuilderConfiguration
     
    FeignClientsConfiguration.DefaultFeignBuilderConfiguration
     
    FeignClientsConfiguration.MicrometerConfiguration
     
    FeignClientSpecification
     
    FeignErrorDecoderFactory
    Allows an application to use a custom Feign ErrorDecoder.
    FeignFormatterRegistrar
    Allows an application to customize the Feign FormattingConversionService.
    FeignLoggerFactory
    Allows an application to use a custom Feign Logger.
    FeignOAuth2Properties
    Configuration properties for Feign OAuth2 support.
    OptionsFactoryBean
    This factory bean is meant to create Request.Options instance as per the applicable configurations.
    PropertyBasedTarget<T>
    A Target.HardCodedTarget implementation that resolves url from properties when the initial call is made.
    RefreshableHardCodedTarget<T>
    This target provides url wrapped under Target.
    RefreshableUrl
    This class wraps url inside an object so that relevant proxy instance can be created using RefreshableUrlFactoryBean.
    RefreshableUrlFactoryBean
    This factory bean creates RefreshableUrl instance as per the applicable configurations.
    SpringQueryMap
    Spring MVC equivalent of OpenFeign's QueryMap parameter annotation.
    Targeter
